use_cases: Toggle binary settings on or off in configuration panels
Enable or disable features in application settings
Switch between dark and light modes
Toggle notification preferences or account settings
ai_summary: A polished toggle switch component from Base UI featuring a smooth gradient track that transitions between gray states, a circular thumb that animates horizontally on toggle, and built-in dark mode support. The switch includes focus-visible states, active states, and shadow depth effects for a refined, accessible toggle experience suitable for modern SaaS applications and settings interfaces.
